item.title: Merge pull request #526 from anthropics/sre-incident-response-agent-fixes
item.description: fix(managed_agents): Fix console image, missing fixture, and summary blurb

item.title: chore(registry): bump SRE incident responder date to 2026-04-10
fix(managed_agents): add missing checkout-svc.log fixture for SRE cookbook
item.description: The SRE incident responder notebook mounts logs/checkout-svc.log as a session resource, but the fixture didn't make it into the public repo during the initial managed_agents import (root .gitignore has *.log). Force-add the file so readers can run the notebook end-to-end.

item.title: fix(managed_agents): SRE registry summary + use raw URL for console image
item.description: - registry.yaml: rewrite SRE incident responder description with the on-call-flow framing. - sre_incident_responder.ipynb: replace the attachment: image ref with a self-closed pointing at the raw.githubusercontent URL (matches data_analyst_agent / slack_data_bot). The platform's MDX rend

item.title: Merge pull request #516 from anthropics/mnowicki/cma-versioning-header-fix
item.description: Print 'v1 results:' header before score loop

item.title: Print 'v1 results:' header before score loop
item.description: VS Code's notebook output renderer strips leading whitespace from the first line of stdout, so the api-platform row rendered two columns left of the others. A header line at position 0 absorbs the strip and the data rows stay aligned.

item.title: Merge pull request #511 from anthropics/charmaine/fix-managed-agents-mdx-formatting
item.description: fix(managed_agents): unwrap markdown paragraphs for MDX rendering

item.title: fix(registry): correct SRE incident responder published date to 2026-04-08
fix(managed_agents): address review — blockquotes, source normalization
item.description: - Join multi-line blockquotes in sre_incident_responder (Next steps) and data_analyst_agent (Warning) onto single lines so inline links and prose render correctly in MDX - Remove trailing empty-string source elements in sre_incident_responder markdown cells (reflow artifact) - Normalize slack_

item.title: fix(managed_agents): unwrap markdown paragraphs for MDX rendering
item.description: The docs site's MDX renderer treats single newlines as hard breaks, so hard-wrapped source paragraphs rendered with mid-sentence line breaks (most visibly, inline links appearing alone on their own line). - Reflow all prose paragraphs to single lines across 8 notebooks - Convert the 4-space-indente
